subcodes.first_line: Verily, We make mention of Our servant, the Merciful, as a token of grace from Our presence, that he may rejoice in this remembrance which, when sent down from the heaven of the Kingdom, caused prostration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الرحیم عبدنا فضلا من لدنا لیفرح بهذا الذکر الذی اذ انزل من سماء الملکوت سجد
